Action - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
Defines interface of an action performed by ActionUnit runner.
action - Variable in class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Retry
 
action - Variable in class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.TimeOut
 
Action.Base - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A base class of all Actions.
Action.Base() - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Base
 
Action.Composite - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Action.Sequential or Action.Concurrent.
Action.Composite(String, Iterable<? extends Action>) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Composite
 
Action.Concurrent - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A class that represents a set of actions that should be executed sequentially.
Action.Concurrent(String, Iterable<? extends Action>) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Concurrent
 
Action.Concurrent.Factory - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
 
Action.Leaf - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
Any action that actually does any meaningful operation outside "ActionUnit" framework should extend this class.
Action.Leaf() - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Leaf
 
Action.RepeatIncrementally<T> - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit

Action.Retry(Action, long, int) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Retry
 
Action.Sequential - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A class that represents a sequence of actions that should be executed one after another.
Action.Sequential(String, Iterable<? extends Action>) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Sequential
 
Action.Sequential.Factory - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit

Action.TimeOut(Action, long) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.TimeOut
 
Action.Visitor - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A visitor of actions, in the style of the visitor design pattern.
Action.Visitor.Base - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
 
Action.Visitor.Base() - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Visitor.Base
 
Action.WithTarget<T> - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A skeletal implementation for actions which are performed with a certain object of type T.
Action.WithTarget(T) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.WithTarget
 
Action.WithTarget.Factory<T> - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
 
ActionException - Exception in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
Encapsulate a general Action error or warning.
ActionException(String) - Constructor for exception com.github.dakusui.actionunit.ActionException
Creates a new ActionException with a given message.
ActionException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.dakusui.actionunit.ActionException
Creates a new ActionException from an existing exception.
ActionException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.dakusui.actionunit.ActionException
Creates a new ActionException from an existing exception.
ActionRunner - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A simple visitor that invokes actions.
ActionRunner(int) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner
 
ActionRunner() - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner
 
actions - Variable in class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Composite
 
Actions - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
This class contains static utility methods that return objects of type Action.
ActionUnit - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
The custom runner of ActionUnit.
ActionUnit(Class<?>) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.ActionUnit
Only called reflectively.
ActionUnit.PerformWith - Annotation Type in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
An annotation to let ActionUnit know the target elements annotated by it provide actions executed by test methods.
apply(T) - Method in interface com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Block
Applies this block to input.

Block<T> - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit

R

repeatIncrementally(Iterable<T>, Action.WithTarget.Factory<T>) - Static method in enum com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Actions
Performs an action created by given factoryForActionWithTarget for each element in given datasource.

Creates an action which retries given action.

timeout(Action, int, TimeUnit) - Static method in enum com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Actions

An extension point to allow users to customize how an action will be executed by this Visitor.

A utility class for static methods which are too trivial to create classes to which they should belong.
